text: As I observed the clean lines of the architecture and the bright, open space from the corridor, I felt anticipation—a sense that something intriguing awaited me beyond the glass doors. Entering the exhibit, the bold letters R+D and the wall's thoughtful text invited me to reflect on inquiry and innovation. I felt a quiet thrill at the convergence of art, technology, and philosophy. The words on the screen resonated: everyday experiences become a philosophical adventure. Here, curiosity feels not only permitted, but essential.
